name: TONIX PHARMA.  DL-,001
summary: Tonix Pharmaceuticals Holding Corp. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for central nervous system (CNS) disorders. The company's pipeline includes products for the treatment of conditions such as post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), fibromyalgia, and depression. Tonix Pharmaceuticals is headquartered in Chatham, New Jersey.
